items.title: Redstone com
items.description:
🚀 招聘：区块链 / Web3 开发工程师

关于我们

我们是一家专注于 区块链与 Web3 技术 的科技公司，致力于构建真实落地的去中心化解决方案和可扩展的 Web3 产品。

职位名称

区块链 / Web3 开发工程师（远程）

岗位职责

开发、测试和维护智能合约

使用 Solidity 在 EVM 兼容区块链 上进行开发

与前端和后端工程师协作完成产品开发

审查、优化并提升智能合约的安全性与性能

任职要求

具备 Solidity 实际开发经验

熟悉 Web3.js 和 / 或 Ethers.js

对 DeFi、NFT、DAO 有良好的理解

有 GitHub 作品集或公开代码示例者优先

加分项（Nice to Have）

智能合约审计经验

熟悉 Layer 2 扩展方案

参与过 开源项目 并有实际贡献

薪资待遇

年薪：110,000 – 130,000 美元（可根据经验协商）

可选择 全职或合同制

完全远程办公，时间灵活

应聘方式

请发送以下资料：

GitHub 主页

简历（可选）

简短的自我介绍

📧 邮箱：elenpoter394@gmail.com

💬 Telegram：@Romanpotter

items.description:
We are currently assisting a leading financial institution in Hanoi to recruit senior–expert level professionals for a large-scale data and core systems transformation project.
📌 Location: Hanoi – Full-time onsite
📌 Open for Vietnamese only

1️⃣ 𝙎𝙚𝙣𝙞𝙤𝙧 / 𝙀𝙭𝙥𝙚𝙧𝙩 𝘿𝙖𝙩𝙖 𝙎𝙘𝙞𝙚𝙣𝙩𝙞𝙨𝙩 – 𝙐𝙥 𝙩𝙤 𝙐𝙎𝘿 𝟲,𝟬𝟬𝟬
5+ years of hands-on experience in Data Science or related roles
Strong experience with AI / ML / GenAI models
Solid background in Analytical AI
Good English communication skills.

2️⃣ 𝙎𝙚𝙣𝙞𝙤𝙧 / 𝙀𝙭𝙥𝙚𝙧𝙩 𝘼𝙄 𝙀𝙣𝙜𝙞𝙣𝙚𝙚𝙧 (𝘼𝙄 / 𝙈𝙇 / 𝙂𝙚𝙣𝘼𝙄) – 𝙐𝙥 𝙩𝙤 𝙐𝙎𝘿 𝟳,𝟬𝟬𝟬
5+ years of hands-on experience in AI / ML / GenAI
Strong experience building and deploying AI models
Experience in one or more areas: NLP, Computer Vision, Speech
Good English communication skills.

📩 𝘾𝙤𝙣𝙩𝙖𝙘𝙩 **𝙄𝙣𝙛𝙤𝙧𝙢𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣**
📞 Zalo/Tel: 0988 312 431

For a confidential discussion, feel free to reach out directly.

items.title: [徵才]Software Senior Principal Engineer
items.description:
Senior Principal Software Engineer



The Software Engineering team delivers next-generation software application enhancements and new products for a changing world. Working at the cutting edge, we design and develop software for platforms, peripherals, applications and diagnostics — all with the most advanced technologies, tools, software engineering methodologies and the collaboration of internal and external partners.



Join us to do the best work of your career and make a profound social impact as a Senior Principal Software Engineer on our Software Engineering Team in [Taipei].

What you’ll achieveAs a Software Principal Engineer on the HCI team, you will be responsible for leading the technical direction and architecture of Dell's AI and Solutions hyperconverged infrastructure platform. This role requires close collaboration with cross-functional teams—including engineering, product management, and quality assurance—to deliver high-quality software solutions that meet customer needs. You will drive technical innovation, mentor engineers, and champion best practices and emerging technologies, including AI tools usageYou will:

1.Technical Leadership:  Overlook cross Domain Engineering gap/risks and provide guidance to engineers to move forward to meet the Site development target.

2.Architecture: Design and implement scalable, secure, and efficient software architectures for HCI, leveraging cloud, virtualization, and storage technologies.

3.Innovation: Drive technical innovation and stay up-to-date with industry trends, emerging technologies, and Dell's technology strategy to ensure the products remain competitive and innovative.

4.Software Development: Lead the design, development, testing, and maintenance of HCI software applications and features, including API development, UI/UX enhancements, and backend infrastructure improvements.

5.Collaboration: Work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure timely delivery of high-quality solutions.

6.Problem-Solving: Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues, perform root cause analysis and recommendations for improvement.

7.Mentorship: Mentor engineers and provide technical guidance to support their career growth and cowork as one team.

8.Strategy: Develop and implement technical strategies to align with business objectives, grow the site capabilities/efficiency.



Take the first step towards your dream careerEvery Dell Technologies team member brings something unique to the table. Here’s what we are looking for with this role:Essential Requirements

• Bachelo's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field or equivalent 10+ years of experience as a software Engineering leader

• Proficiency in programming languages such as Python/Golang on Unix/Linux/BSD operating systems and understanding of data structures, algorithms, and analysis techniques

• AI‑Enabled Software Design and Development Skills: Experience applying AI‑based capabilities to support software design, development, testing, and troubleshooting throughout the engineering lifecycle.

• Experience with network, storage, security product development 

• Proven leadership experience, including mentoring and technical direction, enhance Engineering efficiency 

• Ability to lead teams to design, develop and deliver major features on time with high quality

• Able to engage with customers and support when needed to solve production issues

• Excellent communication, collaboration, and problem-solving skills

• Familiarity with Agile development methodolofies (e.g. Scrum, Kanban)Desirable Requirements

•Experience with cloud-native applications and microservices architecture

• Knowledge of cybersecurity principles and practices

• Experience with containerized orchestration systems (Kubernetes, Rancher, etc) is a plus

• Certifications: Relevant certifications, such as VMware VCP or AWS Certified Developer, are a plus

• Knowledge of DevOps practices and tools (e.g., Jenkins, Github CI/CD) is a plus

Who we are

We believe that each of us has the power to make an impact. That’s why we put our team members at the center of everything we do. If you’re looking for an opportunity to grow your career with some of the best minds and most advanced tech in the industry, we’re looking for you.Dell Technologies is a unique family of businesses that helps individuals and organizations transform how they work, live and play. Join us to build a future that works for everyone because Progress Takes All of Us.Application closing date: 30 March 2026Dell Technologies is committed to the principle of equal employment opportunity for all employees and to providing employees with a work environment free of discrimination and harassment. Read the full Equal Employment Opportunity Policy [here](https://jobs.dell.com/equal-employment-opportunity-policy-statement).



**If you are interested in the position, please contact [lucy.liu1@dellteam.com ](mailto:lucy.liu1@dellteam.com).**

items.title: Lead Graphics Engineer
items.description:
🎮 **We’re hiring a Rendering Engine Lead to redefine how buildings are visualized.**

Maestro is a startup born from research at **MIT** and the **University of Cambridge** 🧠🎓
Our mission: **use software to change the way we build**—turning complex design data into clear, real-time instructions for the people (and soon machines 🤖) assembling our world.

🛠 **The Product**
**Maestro Pilot** is a web-based platform that converts BIM/CAD models, engineering inputs, and site feedback into:

* Interactive **3D assembly manuals**
* **Real-time completion tracking** for clients

Our platform digests massive BIM models, uses **AI** to generate logical assembly sequences, and visualizes them in a **custom 3D engine**.
We’re building the **operating system for the next generation of construction**.

📊 **Proof, not promises**
We bootstrapped by proving the tech in the field.
In just 24 months, Maestro has delivered **mass-timber and steel projects** across Europe and the US 🌍
The impact: less re-work, compressed schedules, and reduced carbon emissions ♻️

🚀 **What’s next**
Manufacturers are lining up for enterprise trials.
Now we’re expanding the software team to ship the **next-gen Pilot** and make **digital assembly the industry standard**.

🧠 **Your Mission**
Take full ownership of our **web-based rendering engine**.
You’ll lead the strategic transition from **Autodesk Viewer** to a fully custom, high-performance rendering solution—defining how massive construction datasets are visualized and interacted with in the browser.

🔧 **What you’ll solve**

* Architect and scale a modular rendering engine using **Three.js + TypeScript**
* Push browser rendering to its limits (1M+ objects) with batching, instancing, Draco compression, and dynamic **LOD streaming**
* Build advanced AEC features: **4D simulations**, sectioning, markup, spatial filtering
* Optimize **GraphQL data pipelines** for decoupled geometry and metadata loading
* Own visualization infrastructure, **data sovereignty**, and security

💡 **Who you are**

* Mid–Senior level (5+ years) in **Three.js / Babylon.js / WebGL**
* Deep understanding of **GPU pipelines, GLSL shaders, and WebGL internals**
* Hands-on experience with **CAD/BIM data** (Revit, Rhino, IFC)
* Strong foundation in **3D math** (matrices, vectors, quaternions)
* Fluent in **JavaScript / TypeScript** (C# a plus)

🧪 **A day in the role**
Morning: Profiling a 500MB BIM model crashing mobile browsers 📱
Mid-day: Writing a custom **GLSL shader** for an X-ray visualization mode 👻
Afternoon: Designing GraphQL queries to fetch only critical metadata and speed up dashboards ⚡

🎁 **What we offer**

* Real ownership: your code ships to **live job-sites**
* Steep growth: work side-by-side with founders
* Equity for top performers 💎
* Startup energy with **real, physical-world impact**

📍 **Location**: Turin (hybrid)

🔥 If you love graphics, performance, and building tools that leave the screen and enter the real world, we should talk.

👉 **Apply via our Portal**: https://www.maestro-tech.com/careers/

#Hiring #GraphicsEngineering #ThreeJS #WebGL #RenderingEngine
#TechCareers #StartupJobs #ConstructionTech #BIM #3DEngine
#AI #DigitalConstruction #TurinJobs

items.title: We're hiring!! Senior Full-Stack Engineer (High-Performance Web)
items.description:
🚀 **We’re hiring builders of the future (in code).**

Maestro is a startup born from research at **MIT** and the **University of Cambridge** 🧠🎓
Our mission is simple and ambitious: **use software to change the way we build**. We turn complex design data into clear, real-time instructions for the people (and soon machines 🤖) assembling our world.

🛠 **The Product**
**Maestro Pilot** is a web-based platform that converts BIM/CAD models, engineering inputs, and site feedback into:

* Interactive **3D assembly manuals**
* **Real-time completion tracking** for clients
  We digest massive BIM models, use **AI** to generate logical assembly sequences, and visualize everything in a custom **3D engine**.
  We’re building the **operating system for next-generation construction**.

📍 **Proof, not slides**
We bootstrapped by proving the tech in the field.
In just 24 months, Maestro has delivered **mass-timber and steel projects** across Europe and the US 🌍
Results? Less re-work, faster schedules, and lower carbon impact ♻️

🔭 **What’s next**
Manufacturers are lining up for enterprise trials.
Now we’re expanding the **software team** to ship the next-gen Pilot and make **digital assembly the industry default**.

💻 **Your Mission**
You’ll build the application backbone of a high-performance **Single-Page Application (SPA)** that connects massive geometric datasets (1M+ objects) directly to the user’s fingertips.

You’ll work on:

* Advanced **UI architecture** (React, SSR/RSC, hydration, rendering strategies)
* **Complex data visualization** (datagrids, flowcharts, 3D overlays)
* **State management** at scale (Redux, Zustand, XState)
* **Algorithms & data structures** (graphs, trees, BIM traversal)
* **Performance-first engineering** (benchmarking, custom lightweight solutions)

🤝 **How you’ll collaborate**

* With the **Graphics Lead** to sync React UI with a custom Three.js engine
* With the **AI Engineer** to visualize AI agents, streaming outputs, and interactive chat interfaces

🧠 **The reality**
From optimizing recursive SQL queries in the morning, to refactoring heavy UI components in the afternoon, your work directly impacts live construction sites.

🎁 **What we offer**

* Real ownership: your code ships to **active job-sites**
* Steep growth: work side-by-side with founders
* Equity for top performers 💎
* Startup energy with **real-world, physical impact**

📍 **Location**: Turin (hybrid)

🔥 Join us early. Ship code that leaves the screen and enters the real world.

👉 **Apply via our Dev Portal** https://www.maestro-tech.com/careers/

#Hiring #FrontendEngineering #ReactJobs #TechCareers #StartupJobs #DevJobs
#3DRendering #BIM #AIEngineering #ConstructionTech #DigitalTransformation
``

items.title: [徵才][台北][1.4M+] SWAG.live 徵求資深前端工程師 | Senior Frontend Engineer
items.description:
## 公司介紹 
SWAG 創立於 2016 年 8 月，最初的產品構想，是要打造一個能串連網紅創作者及用戶的 PGC 流量變現的平台，讓粉絲可以無時無刻的與心儀的網紅互動、讓網紅可以透過人氣實現獲利。
透過豐富多元的內容及強大的行銷推廣，目前平台有超過 400 萬註冊用戶及數千位內容提供者，用戶遍及臺灣、香港、澳門、新加坡、馬來西亞及歐美等，並獲得數十位 YouTuber 網紅大力推薦；成為亞洲最大的影音串流平台。
官方在 2018 上半年開啟了 swag.live ，使用者可以透過網頁直接開啟 SWAG，並陸續加入了直播、一對一私訊聊天以及影片解鎖等新功能。
如今 SWAG 定位為亞洲最大的影音串流社交平台，並且持續的拓展國際市場

* 請至 [SWAG Careers](https://www.swag.careers/) 查看所有招募中的職缺
* 喜歡 SWAG 的文化，卻若找不到合適的職缺嗎？歡迎來信 hr@swag.live 附上履歷，並告訴我們你也很適合 SWAG!

## 薪資範圍
NTD 1,400,000 – 1,800,000 per year

## 工作內容
1. 根據規格獨立開發新功能與除錯
2. 跨部門協作及溝通 (PM, Design, Backend)
3. 產品效能提升
4. 內部程式碼審核

## 必要條件
1. Web: HTML, CSS, Javascript, React, Redux
2. 以下技術任挑五項以上
    * Server-side render: react-router v7, express server, NextJS App router
    * Performance: critical rendering path, event loop, interaction to next paint (INP), intersection observer
    * Persist: Cookie, LocalStorage, IndexedDB
    * Cache: CDN cache, server side fetch cache, redis, cache-control header, service worker fetch cache
    * WebApp: PWA, service worker, push notification, i18n
    * SEO: og headers, canonical headers, ld+json, sitemap/robot.txt

## 加分條件
1. Others: webpack, socket.io, React Native, tween.js, PixiJS, Apple/Google/Samsung Pay, WebASM
2. Players: video.js, DASH.js, shaka-player, bitmovin, ...
3. CI/CD: GitHub action/workflow, Dockerfile, pm2
4. 個性主動積極，樂於研究新知並分享
5. 有帶過新手或領導小專案的經驗

items.title: Swork - Senior or experimented fullstack developper - Remote - FT or PT
items.description:
## Location (MUST)

* Paris, France - Full Remote

## Salary Expectation (MUST)

* $1,500 - $2000/month (per senior profile)

## Requirements (MUST)

* **MedusaJS** & **Node.js** (Expert level for core stabilization)
* **PostgreSQL** (Advanced schema refactoring & optimization)
* **AWS Products** (Lambda/Serverless, S3, API Gateway)
* 5+ years experience in **Software Engineering** with a focus on **TypeScript**

## Skills

### Must Have (MUST)

* Mastery of **Next.js** and **TypeScript** (Strict mode)
* Ability to refactor a "cluttered" production database without data loss
* Experience with headless

### Ideally

* Experience with **Retail/Logistics** software or **ERP** development
* Prior experience with **MedusaJS** in a production environment

### Responsibilities (REQUIRED)

Great power comes with great responsibilities!

### You’ll be responsible for

* Building a new **ERP** for the professional clothing industry
* Refactoring the existing **Swork** database and backend core
* Refactoring and stabilize **Swork** frontend

### You can bring

* A good eye for design (SaaS dashboards & Storefront UX)
* A good analysis skill (Understanding equipment fleet management logic)

### Why it would be awesome to work with us (REQUIRED)

* Impact: Disrupting the **PPE** (Personal Protective Equipment) market
* Technology: Full ownership of the **AWS Serverless** transition
* Partnership: Long-term collaboration with a fast-growing startup

### Interesting Engineering Projects (REQUIRED)

* **Zero-downtime deployment** for long-running background jobs and data sync between Medusa and our ERP
* **Writing a database abstraction layer** to interface with different technologies: migrating from a messy PostgreSQL to a clean, scalable architecture
*  **Coding a headless e-commerce website 

### Contact (MUST)

Homepage: swork.co
Swork Team: contact@swork.co

items.title: [Hibrido / São Paulo, Brasil] Coodenador de TI - Ops na Coodesh
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/coodenador-de-ti-ops-195115404?utm_source=github&utm_medium=devfsa-vagas&modal=open) para realizar a candidatura. 👋 Estamos buscando Coordenador de TI, para compor nosso time. Responsabilidades: ● Planejar e supervisionar o desenvolvimento completo de aplicações, garantindo alinhamento operacional. ● Coordenar a alocação de tarefas entre a equipe, monitorando prazos, qualidade e desempenho. ● Orientar e mentorar desenvolvedores e técnicos, promovendo o crescimento e a eficiência da equipe. ● Facilitar a comunicação entre times técnicos, operações e stakeholders, alinhando expectativas e entregas. ● Gerenciar a modelagem, manutenção e otimização de bancos de dados para suporte operacional. ● Supervisionar a integração de APIs (internas e externas), assegurando fluidez e estabilidade. ● Liderar a resolução de incidentes, aplicando o ciclo de vida de incidentes e práticas ITIL. ● Garantir a documentação técnica atualizada e a conformidade com padrões operacionais. ● Apoiar e otimizar a implementação de sistemas de software, com foco em continuidade de serviço. ● Desenvolver e implementar processos operacionais baseados em SRE para melhoria contínua. ## Namu:

Começamos nossa trajetória em 2013 com o Portal Namu e desde então nos tornamos uma referência na produção de conteúdo multimídia de bem-estar. Temos a yoga, o pilates e a gastronomia como as principais vertentes da empresa, e mais de 8 milhões de páginas visualizadas compartilhamos ensinamentos em aulas, entrevistas e palestras com as maiores referências nacionais e internacionais. O grande sucesso das aulas de yoga, pilates e gastronomia, com mais de 10 milhões de visualizações no YouTube nos inspirou a criar o Namu Cursos, a primeira plataforma brasileira de cursos online completamente focada em uma vida equilibrada.

Em pouco mais de um ano construímos um portfólio que oferece a oportunidade e comodidade de praticar yoga onde e quando você quiser, com mais de 87 horas de aulas divididas entre 35 cursos. Os cursos são ministrados por professores de referência no Brasil que, em vários anos de estudos e experiência nas melhores escolas ou com os Gurus ao redor do mundo, se capacitaram para ensinar de forma didática e com preço acessível.

## Habilidades: - ITIL - Node.js - Javascript - Typescript - PHP - GIT - MySQL - AWS - Nest.JS - Wordpress ## Local: São Paulo, Brasil ## Requisitos: - ● Experiência comprovada em coordenação de equipes técnicas e gestão de operações de TI. - ● Conhecimento em ITIL (Foundation ou superior) e ciclo de vida de incidentes. - ● Domínio de Node.js, JavaScript, TypeScript e PHP. - ● Proficiência em Git (GitBucket) e ferramentas de controle de versão. - ● Experiência com metodologias ágeis e gestão de projetos (Scrum/Kanban). - ● Habilidade em desenvolvimento e integração de APIs REST/RESTful. - ● Conhecimento em bancos de dados relacionais (MySQL) e sua administração. - ● Familiaridade com tecnologias AWS (EC2, RDS, CloudWatch, S3, Lambda,...). - ● Conhecimento em Laravel, Nest.js e WordPress. - ● Experiência em fluxos de integração contínua e entrega contínua (CI/CD). - ● Capacidade de gerenciar serviços de TI com foco em disponibilidade e resolução de incidentes. ## Benefícios: - Convênio médico - Convênio odontológico - Day off de aniversário - Férias remuneradas Acesso à plataforma NAMU - Programa TEM Saúde ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Coodenador de TI - Ops na Namu](https://coodesh.com/jobs/coodenador-de-ti-ops-195115404?utm_source=github&utm_medium=devfsa-vagas&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Alocado #### Regime PJ #### Categoria Full-Stack

items.title: [Remoto] Backend Developer PHP/Laravel na Coodesh
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios. Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/pessoa-desenvolvedora-backend-phplaravel-pleno-175850607?utm_source=github&utm_medium=phpdevbr-vagas&modal=open) para realizar a candidatura. 👋 **TruckPag: Transformando a Logística através da Tecnologia de Pagamentos** A TruckPag é uma startup inovadora no setor de Meios de Pagamento, focada em solucionar grandes desafios e gerar impacto relevante no mundo logístico.Buscamos profissionais talentosos e motivados que queiram tornar as operações logísticas mais efetivas, assertivas e competitivas.Acreditamos que grandes ideias nascem da diversidade de vivências, formações e pessoas únicas.Cultivamos um ambiente de trabalho colaborativo, de alta performance e descontraído, onde você terá a oportunidade de agregar valor significativo à nossa equipe e aos nossos produtos. **Sua Missão (Responsabilidades Principais)** **_Como Pessoa Desenvolvedora Backend PHP/Laravel Pleno_**_, você será fundamental na construção e manutenção da nossa plataforma, garantindo escalabilidade, performance e segurança._ Suas responsabilidades incluirão: * _Desenvolvimento de Funcionalidades: Implementar e otimizar funcionalidades backend complexas utilizando PHP e o framework Laravel._ Manutenção e Performance: Identificar, analisar e corrigir bugs e problemas de performance, garantindo a estabilidade e a manutenção contínua dos sistemas existentes. * Criação de APIs: Projetar, desenvolver e documentar APIs RESTful robustas e seguras para integrações com sistemas internos (Frontend) e parceiros externos. * Colaboração e Planejamento: Participar ativamente das reuniões de planejamento (como sprint planning e dailies), colaborando estreitamente com as equipes de Frontend, Design e Produto. * Qualidade de Código: Assegurar a qualidade e estabilidade do sistema através da escrita e manutenção de testes unitários e de integração com ferramentas como PHPUnit. * Dados e Otimização: Realizar a modelagem de dados e otimizar queries de banco de dados para garantir a eficiência e escalabilidade das operações. * Documentação e Melhoria Contínua: Manter a documentação técnica do código e dos processos atualizada e propor ativamente melhorias para o sistema e o fluxo de trabalho (CI/CD, metodologias, etc.). ## TruckPag:

Somos uma empresa de meios de pagamento especializada em gestão de frotas, com nosso cartão TruckPag, o cliente abastece com economia, facilidade e total controle. Com a CIOTPag, o cliente tem soluções completas para a sua gestão de frete a partir da emissão de CIOT e pagamento eletrônico de frete (PEF) . Além disso, a PagPedágio possibilita que as viagens sejam bem mais rápidas, sem precisar enfrentar filas de pedágios, em todo território nacional.

Somos 100% TruckPag: sem bancos, sem fundos, sem intermediadores e sem burocracia.

Veja mais no site ## Habilidades: - Boas Práticas - Laravel - MySQL - PHP - Postgre - GIT ## Local: Remota ## Requisitos: - Experiência Sólida em PHP: Profundo conhecimento da linguagem PHP e comprovada experiência na aplicação de boas práticas de programação e princípios de código limpo. - Domínio de Laravel: Experiência prática e sólida com o framework Laravel, incluindo o uso de Eloquent ORM, Blade, Middlewares, Service Providers e outros recursos centrais. - Banco de Dados Relacional: Forte experiência em MySQL e/ou PostgreSQL, incluindo modelagem de dados, otimização de queries e manipulação de consultas complexas. - Controle de Versão: Experiência avançada com Git e familiaridade com estratégias de branching consolidadas, como Gitflow. - APIs e Integração: Experiência comprovada no desenvolvimento e consumo de APIs (RESTful) e integração com serviços e sistemas externos (Webhooks, SDKs). - Testes Automatizados: Experiência na escrita e execução de testes unitários e de integração utilizando PHPUnit. - Princípios Arquiteturais: Compreensão e aplicação prática dos princípios SOLID e padrões de design arquitetural comuns (MVC, Injeção de Dependência, etc.). - Trabalho em Equipe: Experiência prévia em ambientes ágeis e colaborativos, trabalhando em conjunto com equipes multidisciplinares. ## Diferenciais: - Experiência em bancos de dados NoSQL: MongoDB ou DynamoDB. - Conhecimento e experiência em filas de processamento e background jobs utilizando ferramentas como Supervisor e/ou serviços de mensageria (ex.: AWS SQS, RabbitMQ). - Familiaridade com orquestração de containers, especialmente Kubernetes (k8s) e experiência no ambiente AWS EKS. - Conhecimento prático em segurança de desenvolvimento e aplicação (prevenção contra SQL Injection, XSS, CSRF, etc.). - Residência em Cascavel - PR (não obrigatório, mas um diferencial). ## Benefícios: - Horário Flexível: Maior autonomia e equilíbrio entre vida pessoal e profissional. - Parceria Alura: Acesso a diversas plataformas de aprendizado para desenvolvimento contínuo. - Descanso remunerado: 30 dias de descanso remunerado por ano. ## Como se candidatar: Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Backend Developer PHP/Laravel na TruckPag](https://coodesh.com/jobs/pessoa-desenvolvedora-backend-phplaravel-pleno-175850607?utm_source=github&utm_medium=phpdevbr-vagas&modal=open) Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação. ## Labels #### Alocação Remoto #### Regime PJ #### Categoria Back-End

items.title: Biz-Tech Analytics - DevOps Engineer - India - Rs.1000-1200/hr
items.description:
We’re hiring for our client: Biz-Tech Analytics

Role: DevOps Engineer (Freelance)
Experience: 4-7+ years
Project: Terminus Project
Location: Remote
Engagement Type: Freelance | Project-based

About the Role:
Biz-Tech Analytics is looking for experienced DevOps Engineers to contribute to the Terminus Project, a hands-on initiative involving system-level problem solving, automation, and containerised environments.
This role is ideal for engineers who enjoy working close to the system layer, debugging complex issues, and building reliable automation in isolated environments.


Key Responsibilities:
 • Work on Linux-based systems, handling process management, file systems, and system utilities
 • Write clean, testable Python code for automation and verification
 • Build, configure, and manage Docker-based environments for testing and deployment
 • Troubleshoot and debug complex system and software issues
 • Collaborate using Git and GitHub workflows, including pull requests and branching
 • Execute tasks independently and iterate based on structured feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
 • Expert-level proficiency with Linux CLI, including Bash scripting
 • Strong Python programming skills for automation and tooling
 • Hands-on experience with Docker and containerized environments
 • Excellent problem-solving and debugging skills
 • Proficiency with Git and standard GitHub workflows

Preferred Qualifications:
 • Professional experience in DevOps or Site Reliability Engineering (SRE)
 • Exposure to cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure
 • Familiarity with machine learning frameworks like TensorFlow or PyTorch
 • Prior experience contributing to open-source projects

Engagement Details
 • Fully remote freelance engagement
 • Flexible workload, with scope to take on additional tasks
 • Opportunity to work on real-world systems supporting advanced AI and infrastructure projects

Payment Details
 • Rs.1000-1200/hr for approved tasks (India)
 • Invoice to be raised 15-20 days after starting the initial task as long as it is approved

Apply via
 • Google form: https://forms.gle/ETNec2n1qJundZsX6

 About Biz-Tech Analytics:
Biz-Tech Analytics partners with global enterprises, AI labs, and industrial businesses to help them build and scale frontier AI systems. From data creation to deployment, the team delivers specialised services including human-in-the-loop annotation, reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), and custom dataset creation.
With a network of 500+ vetted developers, STEM professionals, linguists, and domain experts, Biz-Tech Analytics supports leading global platforms by enhancing complex AI models and providing high-precision feedback at scale.
Their work sits at the intersection of advanced research, engineering rigor, and real-world AI deployment, making them a strong partner for cutting-edge AI initiatives.

items.title: [|Remote] Senior Back-end developer Java - Botcity
items.description:
## Nossa empresa

At BotCity, we’ve built a pioneering Intelligent Automation platform, backed by global investors such as Y Combinator and SoftBank. Our mission is to empower enterprises worldwide to scale their automation initiatives with best-in-class governance, orchestration, and developer tools. We believe that automation projects are fundamentally software projects, which is why we advocate a high-code approach rooted in Python. Our commitment to innovation has enabled us to serve over 1,000 companies in 73 countries, and we continue to expand through strategic partnerships around the globe.

We recently raised a $12M Series A, led by Four Rivers with participation from Y Combinator, SoftBank, and top industry leaders such as Lew Cirne (New Relic), Rod Johnson (Spring Source), and Walter Kortschak (Summit Partners | Firestreak Ventures). With 1,000+ customers in 70+ countries, including Bayer and LG, and recognition by G2 (2024) as one of the world’s top 25 emerging platforms, BotCity is scaling fast. 

We’re a global remote company with teams across the US and LATAM, united by a shared vision to redefine how enterprises build and manage automation. If you’re looking for an environment that values impact, autonomy, and excellence, we’d love for you to join us on this journey.

## Descrição da vaga

The Senior Java Backend Engineer is responsible for architecting and developing complex Java backend applications with a strong focus on scalability, performance, and reliability. Leveraging your deep expertise in the Spring Framework, you will design and implement robust, secure microservices that drive automation at the core of some of the world’s largest and most security-conscious enterprises.

Responsibilities

Architect, develop, deploy, and maintain scalable backend applications using Java/Spring Framework.
Ensure high performance and availability of applications within a microservices architecture.
Collaborate with product managers to understand requirements, ensure their technical feasibility, and translate them into reliable and scalable solutions.
Participate in software engineering rituals to develop models for complex application
Define private and public APIs for a world-class product.
Participate in code reviews, ensuring best practices in backend development.
Write high-quality technical documentation to clearly communicate backend architecture and API design, ensuring ease of understanding and effective collaboration across teams.

## Local

Remote

## Requisitos

Required Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or related technical discipline.
Proven professional experience (8+ years) in backend development using Java.
Proficiency in Spring Framework.
Strong experience in code reviews and managing CI/CD pipelines.
Experience implementing authentication and authorization mechanisms using OAuth, JWT, or SAML.
Experience with version control and project management systems, particularly Git and GitHub.
Experience with SQL and No-SQL databases.
Ability to work independently as well as part of a team, with strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
Prior experience in an early-stage, high-growth and fast-paced startup (or similar) environment.
Ability to travel as needed to meet the team.
Portuguese - Fluent
Preferred Qualifications

Experience in deploying containerized applications using Docker, Kubernetes, or similar technologies.
Experience with Keycloak.
Familiarity with AWS services such as EC2, ECR, ECS, EKS, and ELB.
English - Fluent

## Benefícios

Competitive compensation.
Paid time off (30 days per year).
100% remote and flexible hours.
Caju benefits card.
Conexa health benefits.
Wellhub
Opportunity to work in a global team with teams in San Francisco and São Paulo.

## Contratação

PJ

## Como se candidatar

https://jobs.quickin.io/botcity/jobs/6942bd7904d89c001382e745?src=Github

## Labels


### Nível
- Sênior

### Regime

- PJ

### Alocação

- Remoto

items.title: Flexspace AI - Product Engineer - Remote - Contract
items.description:
## Location 

* Fully remote

## Salary Range

* Compensation up to 4k USD a month, full-time freelance contract (Vietnam, Turkey)

## Requirements

We prioritize these qualities top-down—technical skills can be acquired rapidly by candidates with raw intelligence, low ego, and willingness to work hard.

### Async-first communication excellence

* You write clear, structured messages, specs, and documentation that make meetings optional in a globally distributed team.
* You can explain complex product and technical decisions in writing to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders like operators, sales, and customer success.
* You keep teammates across the US, Canada, Israel, Turkey, Philippines and Vietnam unblocked with detailed PR descriptions, status updates, and decision logs rather than waiting for synchronous check-ins.

### Product-minded, high-agency ownership with speed bias

* You have high agency and accountability: you proactively clarify ambiguous problems, ask the right questions to stakeholders, remove blockers, and drive work from idea to impact without waiting for hand-holding.
* You are a fast learner who can quickly pick up new domains, tools, and concepts, especially around AI, pricing, and B2B SaaS workflows.
* You are genuinely interested in the product, customers, and business context, not just the tech stack.
* You treat engineering as a way to drive operator revenue, bookings, and occupancy—not just to ship code.
* You are comfortable making pragmatic trade-offs between scope, speed, and robustness, especially when iterating toward product–market fit.
* You prefer shipping a "minimum lovable" version this week and learning from operators over polishing in isolation.

### Technical versatility with strong fundamentals

* Track record of building and maintaining production web products, ideally in B2B SaaS.
* Our programming languages include Ruby, TypeScript, and Python. The majority of your time will be spent working in Ruby and TypeScript codebases.
* Strong fundamentals in system design, data modeling, API design, and debugging across the stack.
* Comfortable working across frontend, backend, and integrations, and jumping into unfamiliar parts of the codebase.
* Experience using AI coding assistants as leverage, not as a substitute for sound engineering judgment.

## Responsibilities

We're hiring a Product Engineer to build the e-commerce platform powering the next generation of coworking spaces. You'll work directly with founders and an international team across 6 countries to:

* Discover, design, and deliver product features that drive bookings, revenue, and occupancy for coworking operators.
* Shape the product experience and architecture of an AI-powered e-commerce platform end-to-end.
* Help define the culture, processes, and tooling of a remote, async-first engineering organization.

### What You'll Do

* Own problems end-to-end: work with founders and operators to understand needs, then spec, design, and ship product features that drive bookings and revenue.
* Build and evolve our SmartPricing and SmartMarketing agents—pricing rules, targeting logic, and performance monitoring.
* Create seamless booking experiences with instant payment from operator websites.
* Integrate with coworking CRMs, inventory systems, and analytics tools to sync data and prevent double bookings.
* Use AI tools (Cursor, Claude) to accelerate development while maintaining sound judgment on architecture and trade-offs.
* Write clear specs, RFCs, and PR descriptions that enable async collaboration across time zones.

## Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Stock options and new MacBook upon successful probation
* AI tools budget (Cursor, Claude, GitHub Copilot)
* Founder-track learning at global scale—master product, engineering, and go-to-market for international B2B SaaS
* Flexspace AI is fully remote, with a multidisciplinary team across the US, Canada, Israel, Turkey, Philippines and Vietnam, supporting a genuinely async culture across time zones.
    
## Interesting Engineering Projects

[Flexspace AI](https://flexspace.ai/) helps coworking operators maximize revenue and occupancy through an AI-powered e-commerce platform. We make flexible workspaces instantly discoverable, bookable, and profitable.

Core capabilities include:
* Real-time revenue optimization and booking insights via analytics dashboards.
* A frictionless booking engine embedded in operators' websites for instant online booking and payment.
* AI-powered SmartPricing and SmartMarketing Agents that optimize pricing and launch targeted campaigns automatically.
* Deep CRM and inventory integrations that prevent double bookings and improve attribution tracking.

## Contact
Homepage: [flexspace.ai](https://flexspace.ai/)
Apply at: https://jobs.polymer.co/flexspace/38159

items.title: Vaga: Desenvolvedor(a) Frontend Júnior – React.js
items.description:
# 🚀 Vaga: Desenvolvedor(a) Frontend Júnior – React.js

## Sobre a empresa
A **contabilidade.com** é uma empresa de tecnologia focada em criar software contábil para simplificar a vida de empreendedores no Brasil. Somos um time pequeno, enxuto e altamente colaborativo, onde produto e engenharia trabalham juntos diariamente.

Aqui você vai ter contato com um **produto real em produção**, aprender como decisões técnicas impactam clientes de verdade e evoluir junto com o time.

---

## 🎯 O que você vai fazer
- Desenvolver interfaces usando **React.js**
- Trabalhar com componentes reutilizáveis, props e estado
- Consumir **APIs REST**
- Ajustar layouts e estilos seguindo design e UX
- Participar de **code reviews** e aprender padrões do time
- Versionar código usando **Git**

> 💡 Esta é uma vaga **júnior**. Existe uma curva de aprendizado clara e você terá acompanhamento, mas também precisará estudar e evoluir com autonomia.

---

## ✅ Requisitos obrigatórios
- Conhecimento básico em **HTML, CSS e JavaScript**
- Noções iniciais de **React.js** (componentes, props, estado)
- Vontade real de aprender e evoluir tecnicamente
- Boa comunicação e abertura para feedback
- Organização e responsabilidade com prazos

---

## ⭐ Diferenciais (não obrigatórios)
- Projetos pessoais ou cursos em React
- Noções de consumo de API (`fetch`, `axios`)
- Conhecimento básico de **Git/GitHub**
- Interesse em boas práticas e performance frontend

---

## 📚 O que você vai aprender aqui
- React aplicado em **ambiente de produção**
- Organização de projetos frontend reais
- Integração frontend ↔ backend
- Build, deploy e ambientes com **Cloudflare**
- Como o frontend impacta métricas de negócio e experiência do usuário

---

## 💼 Modelo de trabalho
- 💻 **Remoto**
- 🕘 Horário comercial
- 📄 Contrato PJ


---

## 📩 Como se candidatar
Envie seu **CV ou LinkedIn**, para **talentos@contabilidade.com** incluindo:
- Um breve resumo da sua experiência
- Links de projetos (GitHub, portfólio ou similares)

---

Se você quer sair do básico, aprender React de verdade e trabalhar em um produto real, essa vaga é para você 🚀

items.title: [徵才][台北] 期天資訊 React 前端工程師
items.description:
**職缺: 前端工程師**

**能力經歷要求:**

* 2-3年以上前端 React / TypeScript 開發經驗 (目前公司主專案框架是用 Next.js)
* 基礎 UI / UX 設計規劃能力
* 善於理解業務邏輯，找出合適實做方式，根據客戶反饋進行調整
* 獨立自主學習能力，積極主動

**工作內容：**

開發與維護 React TypeScript 相關專案，包含但不限於：

* 金融交易數據可視化界面 UI/UX
* 程式交易管理系統
* 上線金流串接與會員管理系統
* 電子商務前後台管理系統

**適合此職缺的人格特質：**

* 對金融投資有興趣 (台股期權為主)
* 喜歡理解新事物，能快速動手實做
* 善於安排任務優先順序，能靈活應變各類狀況
* 客戶導向思維，釐清並解決實際問題 (非單純以程式面向考量)

**不適合此職缺的人格特質：**

* 只喜歡獨自埋頭寫程式，排斥溝通討論
* 不喜歡接觸客戶 ( email / 線上會議 / 實體拜訪)
* 數字敏銳度低或邏輯推理較差

**薪資(月薪):** 50,000 - 80,000


**工作環境與該職缺團隊介紹:**

團隊規模約10人，屬於年輕新創小公司風格，組織扁平，每個人都具有影響力。主要產品為證券期貨交易相關資訊系統，提供即時量化數據網站及自動化程式交易相關技術，客戶包含國內多家大型證券期貨商、顧問公司等。

**工作福利:**

* 職務上手熟悉後，可視情況每週1-2天遠端 WFH
* 每週兩天免費午餐，另有不定時老闆請客聚餐
* 各式零食咖啡飲料
* 每週團體運動時間 (目前是2小時羽球)
* 公司有兩隻貓會不定時跑來蹭你 (?)

**公司分紅與獎金:** 依年度盈餘及個人考績分紅

**聯絡方式:** Cory / service@futures-ai.com
